projectDescription: A graphical application for editing and managing NixOS configurations built with GTK4 and libadwaita
keyFeatures: Browse and search NixOS configuration options with a modern GTK4/libadwaita interface
Edit configuration values directly through an intuitive graphical interface
Rebuild NixOS system from within the application with real-time terminal output
Support for both traditional NixOS configurations and Flakes
Advanced option search with filtering and categorization
Syntax validation and error highlighting for Nix expressions
Multi-window support for editing multiple options simultaneously
publicApiSurface: nce-helper config --output <path> (write configuration to file as root)
editconfig(f: String, editedopts: HashMap<String, String>) -> Result<String, Box<dyn Error>>
readval(path: &str, query: &str, refq: &str) -> Result<String, Box<dyn Error>>
AttrTree struct (hierarchical attribute tree for options)
